revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 17 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 17 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月17日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[康平]]5年（[[1062年]]_月_日） - [[前九年の役]]が終結。[[源頼義]]が[[安倍貞任]]を厨川の柵で破る * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]][[11月1日]]） - 日本初の洋式[[燈台]]が観音崎に着工
== 誕生日 == * [[慶応]]3年（[[1867年]][[10月14日]]） - [[正岡子規]]、[[俳人]]・[[歌人]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 ==
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月16日 (旧暦)|9月16日]] 翌日[[9月18日 (旧暦)|9月18日]] - 前月[[8月17日 (旧暦)|8月17日]] 翌月[[10月17日 (旧暦)|10月17日]] *新暦[[9月17日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[康平]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1062年]][[10月22日]]） - [[前九年の役]]が終結{{要出典|date=2021-04}}。[[源頼義]]が[[安倍貞任]]を[[厨川柵]]で破る * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月1日]]） - 日本初の洋式[[灯台|燈台]]が観音崎に着工
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1675年]][[11月4日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1747年]]） * [[元禄]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1689年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川吉通]]、第4代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1713年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月14日]]） - [[正岡子規]]、[[俳人]]・[[歌人]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月23日]]） - [[石田正継]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（* 生年不詳）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[神嘗祭]]（新暦施行後は[[10月17日]]に移動）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月17日'''（きゅうれきくがつじゅうななにち、きゅうれきくがつじゅうしちにち）は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[康平]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1062年]][[10月22日]]） - [[前九年の役]]が終結{{要出典|date=2021-04}}。[[源頼義]]が[[安倍貞任]]を[[厨川柵]]で破る * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月1日]]） - 日本初の洋式[[灯台|燈台]]が観音崎に着工
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1675年]][[11月4日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1747年]]） * [[元禄]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1689年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川吉通]]、第4代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1713年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月14日]]） - [[正岡子規]]、[[俳人]]・[[歌人]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月23日]]） - [[石田正継]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（* 生年不詳）

Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
'''September 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September17-->きゅうれきくがつじゅうななにち、きゅうれきくがつじゅうしちにち）は、[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[康平]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1062年]][[10月22日]]） - [[前九年の役]]が終結{{要出典|date=2021-04}}。[[源頼義]]が[[安倍貞任]]を[[厨川柵]]で破る * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月1日]]） - 日本初の洋式[[灯台|燈台]]が観音崎に着工
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1675年]][[11月4日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1747年]]） * [[元禄]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1689年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川吉通]]、第4代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1713年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月14日]]） - [[正岡子規]]、[[俳人]]・[[歌人]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月23日]]） - [[石田正継]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（* 生年不詳）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[神嘗祭]]（新暦施行後は[[10月17日]]に移動）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Moving from [[Category:先勝]] to [[Category:Senshō]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
running another replacement to get rid of the category inappriproate overlap new ones added
adding korean to all the dates
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:September 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}}. {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}}, the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}}). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}}, the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}}) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}}, a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|慶長}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}}) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}}, a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}} ).

revision.text:
[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062年}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675年}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713年}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar) == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062nd year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689年}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar) == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062nd year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)

[[sn:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[zh:九月十七]] [[en:draft:September 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062nd year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062nd year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|ja|康平}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1062|ja|1062nd year }} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ) – The {{ill|Zenkyū War|ja|前九年の役|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{要出典|date=2021-04}} . {{ill|Minamoto Yoriyoshi|ja|源頼義}} defeated {{ill|Abe Sadanari|ja|安倍貞任}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|lighthouse|ja|灯台|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Kannonzaki|ja|観音崎|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year }} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year }} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year }} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十七]]

== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規|12=draft}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet|12=draft}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継|12=draft}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=draft}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)

== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Empō|ja|延宝|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1675|ja|1675th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|ja|薩摩藩|lt=Satsuma Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1689|ja|1689th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi|ja|徳川吉通|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|lt=Owari Domain|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1713|ja|1713rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|ja|正岡子規|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=draft|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1902|ja|1902nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|ja|Keichō|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1600|ja|1600th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|ja|石田正継|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai|ja|神嘗祭|12=draft|12=draft}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月17日'''（きゅうれきくがつじゅうななにち、きゅうれきくがつじゅうしちにち）は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[康平]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1062年]][[10月22日]]） - [[前九年の役]]が終結{{要出典|date=2021-04}}。[[源頼義]]が[[安倍貞任]]を[[厨川柵]]で破る * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[11月1日]]） - 日本初の洋式[[灯台|燈台]]が観音崎に着工
== 誕生日 == * [[延宝]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1675年]][[11月4日]]） - [[島津吉貴]]、第4代[[薩摩藩]]主（+ [[1747年]]） * [[元禄]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1689年]][[10月29日]]） - [[徳川吉通]]、第4代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1713年]]） * [[慶応]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[10月14日]]） - [[正岡子規]]、[[俳人]]・[[歌人]]（+ [[1902年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1600年]][[10月23日]]） - [[石田正継]]、[[武将|戦国武将]]（* 生年不詳）
== 記念日・年中行事 == * [[神嘗祭]]（新暦施行後は[[10月17日]]に移動）
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840158]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 17|qq=September 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kōhei|Kōhei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1062|1062]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – The [[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . [[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|qq=|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kōhei|Kōhei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1062|1062]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – The [[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . [[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|qq=|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kōhei|Kōhei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1062|1062]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – The [[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . [[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|qq=|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|qq=|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).

== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

revision.comment: Bot: Add Wikidata has short description - based on Wikidata English short description
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十七]][[zh:九月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840158]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 17|qq=September 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Kōhei|Kōhei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1062|1062]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ) – The [[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . [[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

[[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

[[:en:Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|Minamoto Yoriyoshi]] defeated [[:en:Abe no Sadato|Abe Sadanari]] at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – Japan’s first Western-style [[:en:Lighthouse|lighthouse]] began construction at [[:en:Cape Kannon|Kannonzaki]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

== Births == * [[:en:Enpō|Empō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1675|1675]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Satsuma Domain|Satsuma Domain]] (died [[:en:1747|1747]] ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1689|1689]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshimichi|Tokugawa Yoshi-michi]] , the 4th lord of the [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] (died [[:en:1713|1713]] ). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ) – [[:en:Masaoka Shiki|Masaoka Shiki]] , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died [[:en:1902|1902]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1600|1600]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – [[:en:Ishida Masatsugu|Ishida Masatsugu]] , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * [[:en:Kannamesai Festival|Kannamesai]] (Moved to [[:en:October 17|October 17]] after the adoption of the New Calendar)

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|WD=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1062|en|1062|WD=Q19396|lt=1062}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ) – The {{ill|Former Nine Years' War|en|Former Nine Years' War|WD=Q1187448|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|WD=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto Yoriyoshi}} defeated {{ill|Abe no Sadato|en|Abe no Sadato|WD=Q3616500|lt=Abe Sadanari}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|Lighthouse|en|Lighthouse|WD=Q39715|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Cape Kannon|en|Cape Kannon|WD=Q11630643|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Empō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1675|en|1675|WD=Q7624|lt=1675}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|WD=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1689|en|1689|WD=Q7674|lt=1689}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|en|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|WD=Q843299|lt=Tokugawa Yoshi-michi}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|en|1713|WD=Q6873|lt=1713}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|en|Masaoka Shiki|WD=Q315152|lt=Masaoka Shiki}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|en|Ishida Masatsugu|WD=Q6080154|lt=Ishida Masatsugu}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|WD=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|16|9|18|8|17|10|9|0917|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十七]][[zh:九月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十七]][[zh:九月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十七]][[zh:九月十七]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 17|qq=September 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kōhei|en|Kōhei|WD=Q1193572|lt=Kōhei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1062|en|1062|WD=Q19396|lt=1062}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ) – The {{ill|Former Nine Years' War|en|Former Nine Years' War|WD=Q1187448|lt=Former Nine Years' War}} concluded{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} . {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|WD=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto Yoriyoshi}} defeated {{ill|Abe no Sadato|en|Abe no Sadato|WD=Q3616500|lt=Abe Sadanari}} at the {{ill|Chugawa Barrier|ja|厨川柵|lt=Chugawa Barrier|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chugawa Barrier|1=Kuriyagawa Stockade|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410106}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1}} ) – Japan’s first Western-style {{ill|Lighthouse|en|Lighthouse|WD=Q39715|lt=lighthouse}} began construction at {{ill|Cape Kannon|en|Cape Kannon|WD=Q11630643|lt=Kannonzaki}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|WD=Q1145735|lt=Empō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1675|en|1675|WD=Q7624|lt=1675}} {{ill|November 4|en|November 4|WD=Q2994|lt=November 4}} ) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshitaka|ja|島津吉貴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimazu Yoshitaka|1=Shimazu Yoshitaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11246537}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|WD=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain}} (died {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} ). * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1689|en|1689|WD=Q7674|lt=1689}} {{ill|October 29|en|October 29|WD=Q2951|lt=October 29}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|en|Tokugawa Yoshimichi|WD=Q843299|lt=Tokugawa Yoshi-michi}} , the 4th lord of the {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain}} (died {{ill|1713|en|1713|WD=Q6873|lt=1713}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ) – {{ill|Masaoka Shiki|en|Masaoka Shiki|WD=Q315152|lt=Masaoka Shiki}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|lt=waka poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (died {{ill|1902|en|1902|WD=Q2043|lt=1902}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1600|en|1600|WD=Q6720|lt=1600}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – {{ill|Ishida Masatsugu|en|Ishida Masatsugu|WD=Q6080154|lt=Ishida Masatsugu}} , a {{ill|sengoku military commander|ja|武将|lt=sengoku military commander|lt_ja=戦国武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (birth year unknown).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|Kannamesai Festival|en|Kannamesai Festival|WD=Q11255045|lt=Kannamesai}} (Moved to {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} after the adoption of the New Calendar)
